creator: jason@tubnor.net
text:
This patch uplifts exabgp4 from 4.2.21 to 4.2.22 and removes a stale link from the pkg-message.in

4.2.21 was released on 19 July 2022 and 4.2.22 was released on 13 June 2024.

This update fixes a few issues that could be causing instances to hang and other next-hop issues.

Change log:

https://github.com/Exa-Networks/exabgp/compare/4.2.21...4.2.22
